title: Rocking Boats (Optifine/CEM)
description: Makes boats rock (and roll!) in the water
body:
This pack makes the boats and rafts rock while in water, but will stop rocking when on land or being occupied. (there are two versions, see bellow)



### Rocking and Rolling Update
![GIF of Boats Rocking in the water](https://media1.giphy.com/media/v1.Y2lkPTc5MGI3NjExa2Zyaml0bjhteHM3amsxZDlzMGd1cmYyb3k1Mnk2Z2lrYWRhdnU2ciZlcD12MV9pbnRlcm5hbF9naWZfYnlfaWQmY3Q9Zw/VbaoOnocDU1tL02424/giphy.gif)



### OG Rocking Boats
 ![GIF of Boats Rocking in the water](https://media.giphy.com/media/NVqciFlyQ8zmZLiH1t/giphy.gif)

[Optifine](https://optifine.net/home) (or a cem loader mod) is required

Credit to Kreazive for making the [original pack](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/navila-floating-boats-fboats-resource-pack-by-kreazive/). I wanted the pack updated to 1.19 for the chest boats and bamboo rafts, so I'm posting my own version of the pack to here. I added the chest boats; made the boats move less and stop rocking when being ridden.

Works with any boat texture pack (that doesn't use a custom cem boat model)
